browse_button: Browse your files to add images to the project list.
image_list: Select a file to preview it, adjust settings, or remove it from the batch.
clear_list_button: Remove every image from the list and start fresh.
remove_selected_button: Remove only the highlighted image from the list.
global_quality_mode: Set output quality. Choose Massima for best detail and native crop resolution.
global_orientation_mode: Force output crop orientation globally: Auto, Orizzontale, or Verticale.
global_images_across: Number of columns in the split grid (Across).
global_images_high: Number of rows in the split grid (High).
global_crop_margin: Extra pixels added around each crop area. Use 0 to disable margin.
global_output_folder: Optional subfolder name; leave blank to auto-create per image.
global_output_location: Base directory for all generated outputs; leave empty to save near source files.
global_output_location_browse: Choose the output base directory using file explorer.
per_image_enable_custom: Override the global defaults for this specific image.
per_image_images_across: Columns for this image's split grid (Across).
per_image_images_high: Rows for this image's split grid (High).
per_image_orientation_mode: Override orientation for this image only: Auto, Orizzontale, or Verticale.
per_image_crop_margin: Extra pixels around each crop for this image only. Use 0 to disable margin.
per_image_output_folder: Optional custom output subfolder for this image only.
per_image_apply: Save these overrides for the selected image.
per_image_reset: Discard overrides and fall back to the global defaults.
process_all_button: Generate output for every image using global or custom settings; impossible files are auto-detected and skipped, crop skew is auto-corrected, and a final per-file report is shown.
cancel_button: Stop the current processing run immediately.
